fixtureCandidate.privateDataPolicy: Synthetic public fixture. No private app code, local paths, screenshots, app-specific identifiers, or proprietary text were copied.
fixtureCandidate.sourceQuestion: Did report wording keep target-app remediation separate from ShipGuard product QA next steps?

reportQualityQuestions: Did report wording keep target-app remediation separate from ShipGuard product QA next steps?

runtimeEvidenceBoundary.interpretation: Synthetic source-only performance fixture; it does not prove actual CPU, GPU, memory, energy, hitch, FPS, or frame-rate problems.
runtimeEvidenceBoundary.promotionRule: Promote only after a public fixture or same-route runtime proof confirms the issue shape.
requiredRuntimeProof: Same-route Simulator trace, sample, or log evidence for local-only claims.
Physical-device Instruments or equivalent proof for FPS, ProMotion, thermal, battery, wake-path, or hardware-display claims.

scanScope.note: Synthetic fixture; no private source tree was scanned.

scopeBoundary.purpose: Synthetic public fixture for ShipGuard performance report-quality behavior.
